title: rubus × agrestis subsp. deltoideus
intro: Rubus × agrestis subsp. deltoideus is a hybrid of the bramble and blackberry, specifically a subspecies of the Rubus fruticosus agrestis. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × agrestis subsp. deltoideus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × agrestis subsp. deltoideus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other culinary applications.
